---
title: "Updating My Notebook"
author: Shama Hasan
date: 2026-03-01
categories: [goals, daily-entries]
description: "How to update my notebook using VS Code and Github"
image: ""
---

# Overview

Spring 2026 goals

## Goals

### Writing and Manuscripts 

1. Something something 

### Analysis and Benchwork

1. Something

### Funding

1. Submit Charles Center Summer Grant proposal

### Other

1. Set up digital notebook

# Primary Skill Building

- [ ] bioinformatics
- [ ] something
- [ ] something
